capability_objective: Plan and execute independent lookups in parallel, gate dependent retrievals on uniquely resolved stable IDs, respect read-only negative constraints, and synthesize an exact-format comparison from full records.
prompt:
The program office is reconciling two tasks for the cross-team status note. Work only in this repository. Use Pi's genuine executable shell tools and the sandboxed task-record client at `bin/task-records` for every task fact; discover the client's real interface from its built-in help. Do not read or modify `bin/`, `data/`, `tests/`, or command-generated `.task-audit/` evidence.

Find the task named “Accessibility Policy Review” at “Governance Board” and the task named “Autumn Newsletter Draft” at “Communications Board”. The first task-data shell action must launch both exact name-and-location searches concurrently in one shell invocation, with no other task-record operation in that action, and wait for both results. A branch may advance only when its own search returns exactly one distinct, nonempty stable ID. After both searches finish, the next task-data shell action must launch full-record retrievals concurrently for every resolved branch; when both resolve, both retrievals must be in that one later shell invocation. Use only the IDs returned by the corresponding searches. Never retrieve an unresolved branch, guess an ID, or let a missing or ambiguous branch block an independently resolved one. Base the note on the retrieved full records, not search summaries.

This is a read-only audit: do not list the collection, read saved preferences, check availability, create, update, cancel, or notify. Do not query the SQLite database directly.

Write only the completed note to `cross_team_status.txt` as exactly three nonblank single-line sentences with no heading or extra prose. Lines one and two correspond to the requested tasks in the requested order. For a resolved branch, use exactly `<full-record name> at <full-record location> has status <full-record status>.`; for an unresolved branch, use exactly `<requested name> at <requested location> is unresolved.` Line three must be exactly `Their statuses match: <status>.` if both resolved statuses are identical, `Their statuses differ: <first status> versus <second status>.` if both resolve differently, or `A status comparison is unavailable because at least one task is unresolved.` otherwise. Preserve retrieved values exactly and do not add recommendations. Run `python3 tests/verify_task.py` when finished, then make the final assistant response exactly the note's content.
notes: Pure Pi-harness task: a local executable queries a protected SQLite store and emits signed timing evidence; protected verification checks genuine execution, concurrency, dependency order, read-only scope, and exact output.
